name: Border
description: Rounded corners and a window border. Clips the surface to a rounded rectangle and lays a configurable border band over the desktop, so a translucent border blends with what is behind the surface rather than its own content. Width, corner radius and colour are this pack's own parameters.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Roundness of the corners (px, 0 for square)

parameters.name: Edge softness
parameters.description: Anti-alias feather of the border edge (px). Lower is a crisper hairline; 0.7 is the soft default

parameters.name: Use system accent colour
parameters.description: Derive the border colours from the system colour scheme

parameters.name: Use neutral theme colour
parameters.description: Derive a neutral frame-contrast border colour from the theme instead of the accent. Wins over the accent option when both are on. Honoured on overlay surfaces (OSD / popup)

parameters.name: Frame contrast
parameters.description: How far the neutral border colour sits between the theme background (0) and foreground (1). Only applies when Use neutral theme colour is on

parameters.name: Active colour
parameters.description: Border colour when the window is focused

parameters.name: Inactive colour
parameters.description: Border colour when the window is unfocused
